description: You are a licensed land surveyor preparing a boundary survey drawing for a residential property sale. Using the building footprint in '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf', overlay a complete boundary survey including lot property boundary lines forming a closed polygon with labeled bearings (e.g., 'N 45°30 E') and distances. Include front (20 ft), rear (20 ft), and side (5 ft) yard setbacks for R-1 residential zoning, scaled to the drawing units. Add at least one utility easement with dashed lines and annotation, a survey legend or notes block, and a north arrow indicator. Organize all survey elements on dedicated layers following professional drafting conventions. Save the completed drawing to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_survey.dxf'.
